nasb.text: And the Spirit lifted me up and brought me in a vision by the Spirit of God to the exiles in Chaldea. So the vision that I had seen left me.

esv.text: And the Spirit lifted me up and brought me in the vision by the Spirit of God into Chaldea, to the exiles. Then the vision that I had seen went up from me.

cnv.text: 靈把我提起來，在異象中藉著　神的靈，領我到迦勒底被擄的人那裡去；我看見的異象就離開我上升去了。

ccb.text: 灵将我举起，在异象中把我带到迦勒底被掳的人那里，我所见的异象从我面前上升消失了。
